conclusion.description:
Experiment conclusion: won, lost, inconclusive, stopped_early, or invalid.

* `won` - won
* `lost` - lost
* `inconclusive` - inconclusive
* `stopped_early` - stopped_early
* `invalid` - invalid

description.description: Description of the experiment hypothesis and expected outcomes.

exposure_config.description: Custom exposure event configuration. Requires kind, event, and properties (can be empty array).

properties.description: Event property filters for the exposure event. Pass an empty array if no filters are needed.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

filterTestAccounts.description: Whether to filter out internal test accounts.

exposure_criteria.description: Exposure configuration including filter test accounts and custom exposure events.

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

items.description: Experiment metric. Set kind to 'ExperimentMetric' and metric_type to one of: 'mean' (requires source with EventsNode), 'funnel' (requires series array of EventsNode/ActionsNode steps), 'ratio' (requires numerator and denominator EventsNode). Optional fields: name, uuid, conversion_window, goal ('increase' or 'decrease').

denominator.description: For ratio metrics: the denominator EventsNode.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

goal.description: Whether higher or lower values indicate success.

numerator.description: For ratio metrics: the numerator EventsNode.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

series.description: For funnel metrics: array of EventsNode/ActionsNode steps.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

source.description: For mean metrics: EventsNode with 'kind' and 'event' fields.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the metric. Auto-generated if not provided.

metrics.description: Primary experiment metrics. Each metric must have kind='ExperimentMetric' and a metric_type: 'mean' (set source to an EventsNode with an event name), 'funnel' (set series to an array of EventsNode steps), 'ratio' (set numerator and denominator EventsNode entries), or 'retention' (set start_event and completion_event). Use the event-definitions-list tool to find available events in the project.

items.description: Experiment metric. Set kind to 'ExperimentMetric' and metric_type to one of: 'mean' (requires source with EventsNode), 'funnel' (requires series array of EventsNode/ActionsNode steps), 'ratio' (requires numerator and denominator EventsNode). Optional fields: name, uuid, conversion_window, goal ('increase' or 'decrease').

denominator.description: For ratio metrics: the denominator EventsNode.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

goal.description: Whether higher or lower values indicate success.

numerator.description: For ratio metrics: the numerator EventsNode.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

series.description: For funnel metrics: array of EventsNode/ActionsNode steps.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

source.description: For mean metrics: EventsNode with 'kind' and 'event' fields.

properties.description: Event property filters to narrow which events are counted.

items.description: Event property filter, e.g. {key: '$browser', value: 'Chrome', operator: 'exact', type: 'event'}.

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the metric. Auto-generated if not provided.

metrics_secondary.description: Secondary metrics for additional measurements. Same format as primary metrics.

feature_flag_variants.description: Experiment variants. If not specified, defaults to 50/50 control/test split.

rollout_percentage.description: Percentage of users to show this variant.

minimum_detectable_effect.description: Minimum detectable effect in percentage. Lower values require more users but detect smaller changes. Suggest 20-30%% for most experiments.

parameters.description: Variant definitions and statistical configuration. Set feature_flag_variants to customize the split (default: 50/50 control/test). Each variant needs a key and rollout_percentage; percentages must sum to 100. Set minimum_detectable_effect (percentage, suggest 20-30) to control statistical power.
